Name: Noah
Text: First, if you fall while riding an electric scooter and can’t move,

Name: Noah
Text: Ask for help from people around you or call an ambulance.
Toast1: "When riding a scooter, follow traffic rules and wear protective gear."

Name: Noah
Text: If your tooth is broken, pick up the broken tooth and carefully put it in milk or saline.

Name: Noah
Text: Then, take it to the dentist.

Name: Student
Text: Wow! So I can get my tooth reattached?
Toast1: Be careful not to touch the root of the tooth or let it come in contact with anything.

Name: Student
Text: I asked ‘Eve’ and she said this would make the detective happy!

Name: Noah
Text: By the way, is that ‘Eve’ thing popular these days?

Name: Student
Text: Of course! I don’t think there’s anyone who doesn’t use it now!

Name: Student
Text: It does everything for you, so it’s super convenient!
